description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with build and deploy stages, including a hidden job template .compile_pdf that runs in the build stage. The .compile_pdf job uses the philipptempel/docker-ubuntu-tug-texlive image, runs `make -C libro/` to compile the PDF, and saves libro/tmpDir/piensaperl6.pdf as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, uses the alpine:latest image, executes `echo 'Nothing to do...'`, and publishes the public/ directory and master/piensaperl6.pdf as artifacts for GitLab Pages. The pipeline’s stages list contains only deploy as defined.
